name: Dulce de Leche
method: Mix milk, sugar, and baking soda in a saucepan. Bring it to boil, then
lower the heat and keep it uncovered, stir until thickened.
Put vanilla into it, and let it cool.
Meanwhile, heat the oven to 425 degrees F.
Pour the can of sweetened condensed milk in a pie plate. Cover it
Put the plate in a pan and add hot water. Bake the milk in the oven for
about 45 minutes. Regularly see the water level, and continue baking
Remove the pie plate from water and let it cool.
